description:
The best all-in-one screen recorder and video editor. Record your screen, add video effects, transitions and more.

Camtasia is a video-based screen capture program that enables users to demonstrate and communicate ideas or share knowledge using video. From quick video demos to extensive video projects, Camtasia has a wide range of editing tools to create video content from a variety of sources. Users can record from webcam or screen, introduce a variety of effects, and easily share videos over multiple channels.
Feature Updates
- User interface improvements for Transition and Quiz properties.
- User interface improvements for Rev Media.
- Added First to last/last to first word options to Behaviors.
- Improved keyboard accessibility in Tool Panels.
Performance Improvements
- Improved Ripple Delete performance for projects with lots of media.
Bug Fixes
- Fixed Zoom signin.
- Fixed a crash when clicking above closed captions on timeline during looped playback.
- Fixed export of single- and double-quotes when exporting to the VTT caption format.
- Fixed a crash during autosave after opening a 2019 project in 2026.1.2 or 2026.1.3.
- Fix the issue that sometimes extend frame causes a failure.
- Fixed a bug that could cause some trec files to decode incorrectly.
- Fixed issue with Media Bin thumbnails moving erratically when scrolling.
- Fix License refresh.
